scripts.dev:openai:safe: RUNTIME_ENABLED=false AUTO_CONTINUE=false CANDIDATE_COUNT=3 TOP_K=3 MAX_REVISIONS=0 CONCURRENT_JOB_LIMIT=1 OPENAI_FALLBACK_MODE=deterministic_mock next dev --webpack
scripts.ci:verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:agent && pnpm build
scripts.test:unit: pnpm test:build && NODE_ENV=test node --test tests/unit/agent-core.test.cjs tests/unit/runtime-core.test.cjs tests/unit/page-aurora.test.cjs tests/unit/http-auth-redact.test.cjs tests/unit/guided-actions.test.cjs tests/unit/slash-commands.test.cjs tests/unit/chat-openai-contract.test.cjs tests/unit/controller-chat-sync.test.cjs tests/unit/social-image-openai.test.cjs tests/unit/openai-health.test.cjs tests/unit/auth-guards.test.cjs tests/unit/onboarding-flow.test.cjs
scripts.test:api: pnpm test:build && NODE_ENV=test node --test tests/api/routes.test.cjs tests/api/runtime-routes.test.cjs tests/api/revise-route.test.cjs tests/api/openai-health-route.test.cjs tests/api/onboarding-routes.test.cjs
scripts.test:api:seed: pnpm test:build && NODE_ENV=test ENABLE_DEV_SEED_API=true DEV_SEED_TOKEN=seed-test-token RUNTIME_ENABLED=true node --test tests/api/session-seed-matrix.test.cjs
scripts.test:agent: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:api && pnpm test:api:seed && pnpm test:storage:file:contract && pnpm test:integration
scripts.test:coverage:agent: pnpm test:build && NODE_ENV=test node --test --experimental-test-coverage tests/unit/agent-core.test.cjs tests/unit/runtime-core.test.cjs tests/unit/page-aurora.test.cjs tests/unit/http-auth-redact.test.cjs tests/unit/chat-openai-contract.test.cjs tests/unit/controller-chat-sync.test.cjs tests/unit/social-image-openai.test.cjs tests/unit/openai-health.test.cjs tests/api/routes.test.cjs tests/api/runtime-routes.test.cjs tests/api/revise-route.test.cjs tests/api/openai-health-route.test.cjs tests/api/session-seed-matrix.test.cjs tests/unit/storage-file-seed.contract.test.cjs tests/integration/pipeline.test.cjs
scripts.verify:all: pnpm ci:verify && pnpm test:coverage:agent && SEED_TEST_SUPABASE=true pnpm test:storage:supabase:contract
